actionCalls.description: get the picklist values for Product Type on the Avnio Project object for better UX with dual column selection for multi-select picklist
actionCalls.name: Get_Pickvals
actionCalls.label: Get Pickvals

actionCalls.description: link the file(s) from earlier in the flow to the Project
actionCalls.name: Link_File_s_to_Project
actionCalls.label: Link File(s) to Project

actionCalls.description: dynamic navigation to the library search or home page
actionCalls.name: Navigate_from_Flow
actionCalls.label: Navigate from Flow

actionCalls.description: dynamic navigation to the newly created Project record
actionCalls.name: Navigate_to_Project_Record
actionCalls.label: Navigate to Project Record

assignments.description: assign the selected DSR to the Project Record Var
assignments.name: Assign_DSR
assignments.label: Assign DSR

assignments.description: assign the dynamic error message requiring users to upload or link a file
assignments.name: Assign_Error_Msg_File
assignments.label: Assign Error Msg - No File

value.stringValue: A file must be uploaded or linked to the Project.

assignments.description: assign the dynamic error message requiring users to upload or link a file
assignments.name: Assign_Error_Msg_Link
assignments.label: Assign Error Msg - Link

value.stringValue: The URL entered is too long, it must be less than 256 characters. As a reminder, you can only enter 1 URL in each URL Field.

assignments.description: assign URLs to the new Project Record
assignments.name: Assign_File_Links
assignments.label: Assign File Links

assignments.description: assign the error message to be displayed for not selecting an Opp
assignments.name: Assign_Opp_Error
assignments.label: Assign Opp Error

value.stringValue: An Opportunity must be selected from the table before advancing.

assignments.description: assign entered values to the New Project var
assignments.name: assign_Project_Values
assignments.label: assign Project Values

assignments.description: assign Queue Owner to the New Project var
assignments.name: Assign_Queue_Owner
assignments.label: Assign Queue Owner

assignments.description: assign the selected DSR to the Project Record Var
assignments.name: Assign_SIO
assignments.label: Assign SIO

assignments.description: assign User Owner to the New Project var
assignments.name: Assign_User_Owner
assignments.label: Assign User Owner

value.stringValue: Sales Org,Project Details,Opportunity Selection,DSR Selection,File Upload,Select Answers,Enter Comments,Summary,Complete

decisions.name: Business_Unit_Go_No_Go_Required
decisions.label: Business Unit Go No Go Required

decisions.description: check to see if any org62 dsr's were found
decisions.name: Check_for_Org62_SIO
decisions.label: Check for Org62 SIO

decisions.description: check to see if any org62 dsr's were found
decisions.name: Check_for_Org62DSR
decisions.label: Check for Org62DSR

decisions.description: check the selected sales organization to provide unique experience based
decisions.name: Check_Sales_Organization
decisions.label: Check Sales Organization

decisions.description: check to see if a file was uploaded or linked
decisions.name: File_Check
decisions.label: File Check

rules.name: decFile_with_Link
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2 AND 4) OR (1 AND 3 AND 4) OR (1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (2 AND 3 AND 4) OR (2 AND 4)
rules.label: File with Link

decisions.description: ensure that an Opportunity was selected
decisions.name: Oppty_Check
decisions.label: Oppty Check

Flow.description: screen flow to guide user through creation of Avnio Project record v5 9/20 - updated DSR externalID v6 10/4 - updated 'next' button labels, v7 10/6 - help text for opp selection revision v8 10/7 - default SE v10 10/10 - default "commerical" and remove other options (until further go-live) v12 10/13 - updated .org messaging, navigation v13 10/17 - new flow progress LWC components v14 10/17 - Opp Selection Requirement v15 10/31 - Added .Org choice and removed default value v16 11/2 - delayed project creation until after file has been attached v17 11/8 - Added check for Project Intake Flow Access custom permission. v18 11/9 - Pub Sec Customizations

dynamicChoiceSets.description: pcs for Blind Ask field on Avnio Project
dynamicChoiceSets.name: pcsBlindAsk

dynamicChoiceSets.description: pcs for Existing Customer field on Avnio Project
dynamicChoiceSets.name: pcsExistingCustomer

formulas.name: fBusinessDaysEvaluation

formulas.description: check the length of the IDs from the file upload component to have dynamic error messaging for requirement of linked/uploaded file
formulas.name: fFileUploadIdLength
fProgressBar
formulas.expression: CASE({!Sales_Organization}, "Salesforce.org", "Step 1, Step 2, Step 3, Step 4","Step 1, Step 2, Step 3")

formulas.description: formula to standardize the naming of project records
formulas.name: fProjectName

formulas.description: checks if the user has the custom permission indicating they are an SE so that only SE users get stamped in the SE lookup
formulas.name: fSEDetermination

formulas.description: replaces the commas in the string with semicolons to make it MSP friendly
formulas.name: fSelectedProductTypes

formulas.description: If Pub Sec, use the non-required version of the Red Flags field, otherwise use the required Red Flags field.
formulas.name: fx_Red_Flags
fxURL_Length_Exceeded
formulas.expression: IF( OR( LEN( {!NoFileURLInstead.value} ) > 255, LEN( {!NDALink.value} ) > 255 ), True, False)

Flow.label: Avnio RFP Intake

recordCreates.description: create the Anvio Project record from the values entered
recordCreates.name: create_Project
recordCreates.label: create Project

recordLookups.description: for Pub Sec, get the DSR's tied to the Org62 Opp that was selected
recordLookups.name: Get_Org62_DSR
recordLookups.label: Get Org62 DSR

recordLookups.description: for Pub Sec, get the DSR's tied to the Org62 Opp that was selected
recordLookups.name: Get_Org62_SIO
recordLookups.label: Get Org62 SIO

recordLookups.description: get the new project record for reference in the success screen
recordLookups.name: getNewProject
recordLookups.label: getNewProject

fields.name: CreateProjectConfirmationText
fields.fieldText: If you would like to create a Project Record, please click Continue

screens.description: capture the details of the DSR and Project
screens.name: DSR_Project_Details
screens.label: DSR + Project Details

fields.name: dtxtInstructions
fields.fieldText: Complete the following information related to the Project and DSR﻿

fields.name: RFP_Details
fields.fieldText: RFP Details

fields.name: Due_Date
fields.fieldText: Due Date
fields.helpText: Date on which the proposal needs to be submitted to the customer

fields.name: Region_Business_Unit
fields.fieldText: Region/Business Unit
fields.helpText: Select your global region or AMER Sales org

fields.name: Existing_Customer
fields.fieldText: Existing Customer?
fields.helpText: Is this for an existing Salesforce customer for any product?

fields.name: Blind_Ask
fields.fieldText: Unanticipated RFP?
fields.helpText: Formerly "Blind Ask", "Unanticipated RFP" is used to indicate if we have had previous engagements with this customer and knew this RFP was being issued; select NO. If this RFx is the first time you have communicated with the customer, select YES.

fields.name: Big_Bet_Strategic_Account
fields.fieldText: Big Bet / Strategic Account
fields.helpText: Select YES if this is a designated Big Bet or Strategic Account by sales ops as part of this fiscal year's top priorities.

fields.name: Salesforce_Account_Team
fields.fieldText: Salesforce Account Team
fields.helpText: Provide the names of Salesforce account team members, partners, managers, etc. who need to be included as part of this project.

validationRule.errorMessage: There is a 255 character limit, please shorten your entry.

fields.name: Red_Flags_Current_Issues
fields.fieldText: Red Flags/Current Issues
fields.helpText: Provide information regarding any known red flags or current issues with this opportunity or account that could impact this request.

validationRule.errorMessage: There is a 5,000 character limit, please shorten your entry.

fields.name: Red_Flags_Current_Issues_PS
fields.fieldText: Red Flags/Current Issues
fields.helpText: Provide information regarding any known red flags or current issues with this opportunity or account that could impact this request.

validationRule.errorMessage: There is a 5,000 character limit, please shorten your entry.

fields.name: Additional_Details
fields.fieldText: Additional Details
fields.helpText: Provide additional details on what is needed to support this request or the timeline provided.

validationRule.errorMessage: There is a 2,000 character limit, please shorten your entry.

fields.name: dtxtProductSelection
fields.fieldText:
Product Selection

Select the products that will be included as part of the solution for this RFx.

Accurate selection ensures proper qualification and evaluation of this project.

fields.name: dtxtTableInstructions_Opportunity_0
fields.fieldText: Select the Org62 DSR﻿

fields.name: dtxtErrorMessage
fields.fieldText:
Something went wrong with this flow.


Your admin has received an email about this error.

fields.name: SuccessMessage
fields.fieldText:
Upload File(s)

Use the component below to upload any RFP documents issued by the customer and a link to the NDA, if applicable

fields.name: dtxtNoFileError
fields.fieldText: {!vFileErrorMsg}

value.stringValue: No file to upload? Post Link to URL below. Must start with http:// or https://
Provide a Link to the NDA (optional). Must start with http:// or https://

fields.name: URL_Help
fields.fieldText: Please Note: Only one link can be added into the URL fields. Additional documents should be uploaded as files or added in the Chatter feed of the project record.

fields.name: dtxtTableInstructions_Opportunity
fields.fieldText:
Select the Org62 Opportunity

Use the search component to locate and select the desired Opportunity

fields.name: dtxtOppError
fields.fieldText: {!vOppErrorMsg}

fields.name: PubSec_Error
fields.fieldText:
You selected Public Sector as the Sales Organization.


This field selection is limited to the Public Sector RFP Team. Account teams should continue to submit a "Industry Support - Public Sector" DSR for RFx support.


Click Previous to select a different Sales Organization, or Finish to close out.

fields.name: dtxtSuccess2_0
fields.fieldText:
You've successfully created Project {!getNewProject.Name}

{!getNewProject.avnio__ProjectName__c}﻿

fields.name: RFPSupportedMessage_0_0
fields.fieldText: Click 'Finish' to be directed to your Project so you can continue working on it.

fields.name: dtxtSuccess1
fields.fieldText:
You've successfully created Project {!getNewProject.Name}

{!getNewProject.avnio__ProjectName__c}

fields.name: SelfServiceMessage
fields.fieldText:
Self Service Notification


Because this RFP Response is either less than $200K, a Blind Ask or the turnaround time is less than 5 business days from today, this RFP is only eligible for Self Service.


Click 'Finish' to be directed to the Library Search, where you can find Responses to questions within your RFP.


Additionally, visit the RFP page on Solutions Central for links to our additional resources.


If you have further questions, reference our slack channel: q-branch-rfp

fields.name: RFPSupportedMessage
fields.fieldText:
RFP Support Notification


Thank you for submitting this RFP. Because it meets our initial support criteria, this RFP is approved for review and qualification by the RFP Team.


Our review and qualification process varies by region and products. After internal review of the request and RFP, you will receive a response within 24 hours determining the level of support the RFP Team can provide.


Click 'Finish' to be directed to your Home Tab.

fields.name: dtxtInstructions_0
fields.fieldText: Select the Sales Organization related to the Project

fields.name: Sales_Organization
fields.fieldText: Sales Organization
fields.helpText: Select the sales organization for this account

fields.name: dtxtTableInstructions_Opportunity_0_0
fields.fieldText: Select the Org62 SIO

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
Attention: You do not have permission to create a Project in Avnio.


If this is a mistake, please contact your manager.

variables.description: apex defined variable to store the org62 opp column for table display
variables.name: avOrg62OppColumn

variables.description: collection variable to store the RFP Answer for bulk creation
variables.name: cvarRFPAnswers

variables.description: collection variable to store the available product type picklist values
variables.name: cvPickvals

variables.description: stores the Org62 DSR that was selected from the datatable
variables.name: org62DSRfromdatatable

variables.description: to determine where the flow was launched from to dynamically provide a different UX
variables.name: varLaunchPoint

variables.description: dynamic error message for no file uploaded or linked
variables.name: vFileErrorMsg

variables.description: Error to Display if no Opps are selected from the table
variables.name: vOppErrorMsg

variables.description: the ID of the DSR that was selected in the datatable
variables.name: vSelectedDSRId
